name: LI-Outreach / 2 — LinkedIn Campaign
_comment: Branches on $env.LINKEDIN_ENGINE to route sends to HeyReach (cloud API) or LinkedHelper 2 (local HTTP). Respects daily rate limits from rate_limit_log. Picks the next-due touch_type per lead (connection_request -> first_message -> follow_up_1 -> follow_up_2).

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(connections_sent),0) AS conn_today, COALESCE(SUM(messages_sent),0) AS msgs_today FROM rate_limit_log WHERE campaign_id = $1 AND day = CURRENT_DATE;

WITH next_due AS (SELECT l.id AS lead_id, l.linkedin_url, l.contact_name, l.title, l.company_name, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1) THEN 'connection_request' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1 AND cm.touch_type='connection_request' AND cm.status='connection_accepted') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1 AND cm.touch_type='first_message') THEN 'first_message' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1 AND cm.touch_type='first_message' AND cm.sent_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1 AND cm.touch_type='follow_up_1') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM li_replies r WHERE r.lead_id = l.id) THEN 'follow_up_1' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1 AND cm.touch_type='follow_up_1' AND cm.sent_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_messages cm WHERE cm.lead_id = l.id AND cm.campaign_id = $1 AND cm.touch_type='follow_up_2') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM li_replies r WHERE r.lead_id = l.id) THEN 'follow_up_2' ELSE NULL END AS next_touch FROM contactable_leads l) SELECT * FROM next_due WHERE next_touch IS NOT NULL ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO campaign_messages (campaign_id, lead_id, touch_type, template_used, message_body, sent_at, status, engine_message_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), 'sent', $6) ON CONFLICT (campaign_id, lead_id, touch_type) DO UPDATE SET sent_at = NOW(), status = 'sent', engine_message_id = EXCLUDED.engine_message_id RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO rate_limit_log (campaign_id, day, connections_sent, messages_sent) VALUES ($1, CURRENT_DATE, CASE WHEN $2 = 'connection_request' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN $2 <> 'connection_request' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ON CONFLICT (campaign_id, day) DO UPDATE SET connections_sent = rate_limit_log.connections_sent + CASE WHEN $2 = 'connection_request' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, messages_sent = rate_limit_log.messages_sent + CASE WHEN $2 <> 'connection_request' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;
